pr.title: Record Submission: Poly5 Softcap + Z-Loss + YaRN + Zstd-22 + Stride-16 (on PR #549 stack)

output.summary: Adds adaptive focal CE, RVQ quantization, and progressive depth warmup atop the Poly5+YaRN stack with zstd-22 compression and stride-16 eval.
techniques: Adaptive focal cross-entropy reweights tokens by confidence to focus gradients
Residual vector quantization with int6 base plus int4 residual keeps artifact compact
Progressive depth warmup freezes/unfreezes layers in stages for cleaner deep gradients
